text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Boy, runnin' sure is a hoot! ♪ And so's watchin'
races! ♪ That's why I'm out to happify everyone
with my racin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's have ourselves a shindig to celebrate
us gettin' started! Every start's an art, after all! All
righty, let's buckle to it, pardner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
